landing.hero_subtitle: AI-powered trademark risk assessment for confident brand registration in the Turkish market.
landing.search_placeholder: Enter a trademark name... (e.g. Nike, Apple, Samsung)
landing.search_hint: Text • Visual • Phonetic • Semantic • Translation analysis
landing.search_limit_reached: Search limit reached. Sign up for free to get more.
landing.cta_register_hint: Sign up for free to unlock more features
landing.safe_cta_desc: Based on search results, your brand/logo has low similarity with existing trademarks. You can proceed with registration.
landing.studio_cta_desc_text: This name has high similarity with existing trademarks. Use AI Studio to generate safe alternative names for your brand.
landing.studio_cta_desc_image: This logo has high visual similarity with existing trademarks. Use AI Studio to generate safe alternative logos for your brand.
landing.studio_cta_desc_both: This name and logo have high similarity with existing trademarks. Use AI Studio to generate safe alternative names and logos for your brand.
landing.step1_desc: Enter the brand name you want to register or upload your logo.
landing.step2_desc: 5 different AI models analyze text, visual, phonetic, semantic, and translation similarity.
landing.step3_desc: Register your brand with confidence using the detailed risk report, or plan your strategy.
landing.features_subtitle: All the tools you need for the trademark registration process in one platform.
landing.feature_search_desc: Comprehensive trademark research with database and Agentic TURKPATENT scanning.
landing.feature_radar_desc: Automatic scanning of new trademark applications and opposition deadline tracking.
landing.feature_watchlist_desc: Monitor your brands, get instant alerts for similar applications.
landing.feature_studio_desc: Safe brand name suggestions and AI logo design.
landing.feature_reports_desc: Create detailed risk reports in PDF and Excel formats.
landing.feature_translation_desc: Automatically detect brand similarities across different languages.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Get started with the free plan.
landing.about_text: IPWatchAI is Turkey's leading AI-powered trademark risk analysis platform. We provide comprehensive similarity analysis using advanced AI models such as CLIP, DINOv2, and MiniLM on TURKPATENT data.
landing.mission_text: To democratize trademark registration processes with artificial intelligence and enable businesses of all sizes to effectively protect their intellectual property rights.
landing.about_svc_search_desc: Comprehensive trademark research across our database and Agentic TURKPATENT search using text, logo images, and Nice class combinations. Logo similarity via CLIP and DINOv2 visual models, text similarity via MiniLM, and translation similarity analysis via NLLB-200.
landing.about_svc_radar_desc: Automatically scans for new applications similar to your watchlisted trademarks and notifies you before opposition deadlines expire. Protect your brand by filing timely oppositions against threatening applications.
landing.about_svc_watchlist_desc: Add your brands and competitors to the watchlist. When new bulletins are published, AI models automatically scan and report similar applications with risk scores.
landing.about_svc_studio_desc: Get AI-powered safe brand name suggestions with low similarity to existing trademarks and high registration potential. AI-assisted visual suggestions for logo design.
landing.about_tech_clip: OpenAI's multimodal model for logo and visual similarity analysis
landing.about_tech_dino: Meta's self-supervised learning model for visual feature extraction
landing.about_tech_minilm: Semantic similarity comparison for brand names and text
landing.about_tech_nllb: Translation model supporting 200 languages for cross-lingual trademark similarity detection
landing.about_tech_ocr: Text extraction and comparison from logo images
landing.about_tech_pgvector: High-performance vector similarity search on PostgreSQL
landing.about_data_desc: All our data is sourced from official TURKPATENT bulletins and gazettes. Our database is regularly updated and new applications are automatically processed by AI models.
landing.mission_vision_text: To transform intellectual property protection processes in Turkey and the region with cutting-edge AI technologies. To create an ecosystem where every business — from small entrepreneurs to large corporations — can effectively and affordably protect their brand.
landing.mission_val1_desc: We set industry standards in trademark similarity analysis using the latest AI models (CLIP, DINOv2, MiniLM, NLLB-200). We continuously improve our platform through research and development.
landing.mission_val2_desc: We use official TURKPATENT data as our source. Our AI model results are transparent and traceable, providing users with trustworthy risk assessments.
landing.mission_val3_desc: We offer brand protection services at affordable prices not just for large companies, but for businesses of all sizes. Everyone can try our platform with the free search feature.
landing.mission_val4_desc: Regional accessibility with Turkish, English, and Arabic interface support. Thanks to the NLLB-200 model, we can detect trademark translation similarities across 200 languages.
landing.mission_why_desc: Traditional trademark research methods were time-consuming, expensive, and human-dependent. IPWatchAI automates this process with AI technologies, delivering comprehensive risk analysis in minutes. Our multi-layered approach analyzing visual, textual, and translation similarities simultaneously uncovers risks that could escape the human eye.

pricing.title: Plans built for every trademark workflow
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your current monitoring volume and team size.
pricing.free_desc: A simple way to explore the platform before moving to a paid plan.
pricing.starter_desc: Core billing and monitoring for solo practitioners.
pricing.professional_desc: Deeper Agentic Search and workflow capacity for growing firms.
pricing.enterprise_desc: Expanded access, support, and scale for larger teams and portfolios.
pricing.faq_q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
pricing.faq_a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect in the next billing cycle.
pricing.faq_a2: Agentic Search pulls real-time data from the TURKPATENT portal to access the most current trademark information. Standard search uses bulletin data.
pricing.faq_a3: Opposition Radar automatically detects new applications that are similar to trademarks in your watchlist and helps you track opposition deadlines.
pricing.faq_a4: You can pay via bank transfer or credit card. Annual plans receive a 20% discount.

checkout.hero_title: Finish account setup and activate your plan.
